sources.name: russia-mobile-internet-whitelist
sources.notes: Primary whitelist of domains observed during Russian mobile internet whitelist modes.

sources.name: russia-mobile-internet-cidrwhitelist
sources.notes: CIDR-oriented source; current parser extracts only domain-like tokens if present.

sources.name: kort0881-russia-whitelist
sources.notes: Community-maintained whitelist with explicit host:port entries; parser keeps the hostname part only.

sources.name: net4people-bbs-516-pastebin
sources.notes: Single community snapshot linked from net4people/bbs issue #516; useful but noisier than curated repo sources.

sources.name: ooni-zapret-list
sources.notes: Blocked-domain signal derived from OONI-driven measurements, consumed from the release domains asset.

sources.name: re-filter-lists
sources.notes: Curated blocked-domain list from re:filter community sources.

sources.name: runetfreedom-ru-blocked
sources.notes: Release text export of runetfreedom geosite:ru-blocked category.

sources.name: vpn-configs-for-russia-bypass
sources.notes: Heuristic signal from VPN config docs; lower priority because parsing comes from free text.

sources.name: vpn-configs-for-russia
sources.notes: Heuristic foreign-service signal from free-form VPN config docs.
